articles.title: Taiwan’s William Lai lands in eSwatini on trip Beijing calls a political ‘stunt’ - South China Morning Post
articles.description: Lai travels to island sole African ally after earlier visit cancelled because of overflight permission withdrawn.
articles.content:
In a Facebook post on Saturday evening, Lai said he arrived earlier in the day. The eSwatini government also confirmed his arrival on its own Facebook page.
Hello to my fellow citizens. I arrived ea… [+516 chars]
